verses.text: Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah mi makaite teng uh hi. Tua lo midang teng, amau' lak pan mi sawmah khat, khuapi siangtho Jerusalem-ah a teng ding aisanna tawh kiteel uh a, a omlai mi sawmah kuate ahih leh khuapi dangte-ah om uh hi
Tua hi a, sawllohin, Jerusalem-ah amau' thu-in a tengtawm nuam khempeuhte mipi in pakta uh hi

Hih a nuai-ate pen Jerusalem-a a teng a uksawn ukpite ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin Judah khuapi dangte-ah Israel midangte, siampite, Levi mite, biakinn nasemte, leh Solomon' nasemte' suanlekhakte teng uh a, amau' neihsa, amau' khuapi ciatah teng uh hi
Judah minam leh Benjamin minam sung panin mi pawlkhat zong Jerusalem-ah teng uh hi.
leh Shelah' suan Zekhariah, a tapa Joiarib, a tapa Adaiah, a tapa Hazaiah, a tapa Kolhozeh, a tapa Baruk, a tapa Maaseiah' suante ahi uh hi
Jerusalem-ah a teng Perez' suante khempeuh galhang mi za li sawmguklegiat a pha uh hi.
Jeshaiah' tapa Ithiel, a tapa Maaseiah, a tapa Kolaiah, a tapa Pedaiah, a tapa Joed, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Sallu' suante
leh a beh Gabbai leh Sallai hi uh a, mi za kua sawmnih giat pha uh hi
Zikri' tapa Joel pen amau' mapi hi a, Hassenuah' tapa Judah pen khuapi uk a nihnapa ahi hi.
Pasian' biakinn a uk Ahitub' tapa Meraioth, a tapa Zadok, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Hilkiah, a tapa Seraiah, a tapa Joiarib, a tapa Jedaiah, leh Jakhin
leh inn nasep a sem a behte hi uh a, mi za giat sawmnihlenih pha uh hi. Tua ciangin Malkhijah' tapa Pashhur, a tapa Zekhariah, a tapa Amzi, a tapa Pelaliah, a tapa Jehoram, a tapa Adaiah
leh beh lutang ahi a beh dangte hi a, mi za nih sawmlinih pha uh hi. Tua ciangin Immer' tapa Meshillemoth, a tapa Ahzai, a tapa Azarel, a tapa Amashai
leh a thahat a vanglian a behte hi a, mi za khat sawmnihgiat pha uh a, Haggedolim' tapa Zabdiel pen amau' mapi ahi hi.
Bunni' tapa Hashabiah, a tapa Azrikam, a tapa Hasshub, a tapa Shemaiah
leh Pasian' biakinn pualam nasep a uk, Levi mite' ukpite ahi Shabbethai, Zozabad

leh lungdam koh thungetna patkhiat ding a makai Asaf, a tapa Zabdi, a tapa Mika, a tapa Mattaniah, leh a sanggamte lakah a nihna ahi Bakbukiah, leh Jeduthun' tapa Galal, a tapa Shammua, a tapa Abda' suante beh ahi uh hi
Khuapi siangtho sungah Levi mi a om khempeuh mi za nih sawmgiatli a pha uh hi.
Akkub, Talmon, leh a behte hi uh a, mi za khat sawmsagih nih pha uh hi
A omlai Israel-te, siampite, leh Levi mite ahih leh Judah khuapi dangte-ah amau' luah leitang ciatah teng uh hi
Ahi zongin biakinn nasemte ahih leh Ofel mualbo-ah teng uh a, Ziha leh Gishpa in amaute a uk uh hi
Jerusalem-a Levi mite ukin Pasian' biakinn nasepna a vaanpa pen Mika' tapa Mattaniah, a tapa Hashabiah, a tapa Bani, a tapa Uzzi hi a, amah pen lasa Asaf suante sung pan ahi hi
Tuate beh in kumpipa' thupiakna tawh na sem uh a, tua lasate in nisimin na a sep ding uh kisam hi
Tua ciangin Judah' tapa Zerah, a tapa Meshezabel, a tapa Pethahiah pen mite tawh kisai zum thu khempeuhah kumpipa' zat pen ahi hi.
Khuaneute leh a kiima lote tawh kisai-in: Mi pawlkhatte' ten'na pen Kiriatharba leh a khuaneute, Dibon leh a khuaneute, Jekabzeel leh a khuaneute
Jeshua, Moladah, Bethpelet
Hazarshual, Beersheba leh a khuaneute
Ziklag, Mekonah leh a khuaneute
Enrimmon, Zorah, Jarmuth
Zanoah, Adullam leh a khuaneute, Lakhish leh a lote, leh Azekah leh a khuaneute ahi hi. Tua hi a, amaute pen Beersheba panin Hinnom Kuam dongah teng uh hi
Tua ciangin Geba, Mikmash, Aija, Bethel leh a khuaneute
Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah
Hazor, Ramah, Gittaim
Hadid, Zeboiim, Neballat
Lod, Ono, leh Geharashim khuate-ah Benjamin mite teng uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah gama Levi mite pawlkhat Benjamin gamah kigawm hi.
